title: 大阪杯の後に・それでも走れ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City finishes her run in the Osaka Hai. The
crowd is left in awe, but a persistent doubt weighs
Gold City down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, her manager comes and suggests
she stop running. Her performance today was
unsightly and empty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I protest, arguing that Gold City has yet to
say she wants to quit. Doing so would lead her to
regret.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City declares she will decide her future for
herself. She sets forth to try and fill that
emptiness by the time the spring Tenno Sho
comes around.
